title: Flaky Russian Eggs Frittata
description: A sweet, flaky, and delicious brunch dish featuring orange zest, stir-fry, and a low-carb twist. This recipe is perfect for a weekend breakfast or a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Grated orange zest
ingredients.notes: Use organic oranges for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: Use a low-carb sugar substitute for a keto version.

instructions: In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat and cook until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, and sea salt.
Add the ground almonds and cottage cheese to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet with the browned butter and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes or until the eggs are set and the edges are golden brown.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with orange zest and chopped parsley.
Let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
